en_body:
..ch
....o
......co
.........late

her brown lipstick trace
rises upon the bow
................of the ship
.......................coming into harbor
the sandbar sleeps soundly: drunken sunlight pouring blazing upon its head

coughing-hoarse the soldier lies watching
..............................wave-foam
..............................seeping into ears, nose, throat
..............................salt whitening the lashes
.................................the tide
..............................falls and rises
stinging eyes sit watching water-smoke bloom seaweed flowers, shore flowers

brown mud fragrant as candy,
.......................chocolate, I hold you
.......................fragrant
.......................the lips kissing Sài-Gòn

when the sun laughs loudly
pull down the journey's hood
the sandbar strangely deepens into color
........................brown of withered casuarina
the faraway life leans down
........................suiciding in
........................a puddle
........................of stirred mud
the prodigal one bows his face
........................kissing the clay hill
........................remembering the chocolate bar
........................each rectangular square
................................lying across her lips

remembering you...the breath
of candy
and the breast of the hill

your lips, a trace of brown candy
your body,
clay

lying somewhere, forest or mountain, sea-sand, sun

remembering you
.......and the Civilization of Sài-Gòn

the candy trace upon the lips ./.
.......kissing you
.......chocolate
loving you in purity
.......Little SaiGon..!!
note: The soldier's harbor vision braids sensual memory of Sài-Gòn with the Biblical image of the prodigal wanderer.
